mapper.select: SELECT trade_id, maturity_date, forward_rate, forward_point, settlement_method, net_settlement_amount, currency1_account, currency2_account, margin_account_id, margin_amount, amount, is_rolled_over, original_trade_id, early_delivery_flag, early_default_flag FROM fx_forward_trade WHERE trade_id = #{tradeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_forward_trade (trade_id, maturity_date, forward_rate, forward_point, term, settlement_method, net_settlement_amount, currency1_account, currency2_account, margin_account_id, margin_amount, amount, is_rolled_over, original_trade_id, early_delivery_flag, early_default_flag) VALUES (#{tradeId}, #{maturityDate}, #{forwardRate}, #{forwardPoint}, #{term}, #{settlementMethod}, #{netSettlementAmount}, #{currency1Account}, #{currency2Account}, #{marginAccountId}, #{marginAmount}, #{amount}, #{isRolledOver}, #{originalTradeId}, #{earlyDeliveryFlag}, #{earlyDefaultFlag})
mapper.update: UPDATE fx_forward_trade SET maturity_date = #{maturityDate}, forward_rate = #{forwardRate}, forward_point = #{forwardPoint}, term = #{term}, settlement_method = #{settlementMethod}, net_settlement_amount = #{netSettlementAmount}, currency1_account = #{currency1Account}, currency2_account = #{currency2Account}, margin_account_id = #{marginAccountId}, margin_amount = #{marginAmount}, amount = #{amount}, is_rolled_over = #{isRolledOver}, original_trade_id = #{originalTradeId}, early_delivery_flag = #{earlyDeliveryFlag}, early_default_flag = #{earlyDefaultFlag} WHERE trade_id = #{tradeId}
